groupsList.title: Your groups
groupsList.subtitle: Active groups you're a member of.
groupsList.emptyBody: Answer today's prompt to form your first group.
eventsList.title: Your events
eventsList.subtitle: Upcoming and past events you're attending.
eventsList.emptyBody: Create one or wait for today's match.
eventsNew.title: Create event
eventsNew.subtitle: Set up a public pickup before today's match.
eventsNew.comingSoon: Manual event creation is coming soon. Captains can create group-linked events from the group plan.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile, sports, location, privacy, reminders.
settings.profile.title: Profile
settings.sports.title: Sports
settings.sports.body: Pick up to six sports and your level.
settings.sports.editHint: Edit your sports during onboarding for now. Inline editing here is coming soon.
settings.location.title: Location
settings.location.body: City and how far you'll travel. We never store your exact home address.
settings.location.editHint: Inline editing of location is coming soon.
settings.privacy.title: Privacy
settings.privacy.public: Public — anyone with the username link
settings.privacy.private: Private — only members of your groups
settings.privacy.approxLocationBody: We always round and jitter your home — it never appears precisely on the map.
settings.reminders.title: Reminders
settings.reminders.body: We'll nudge you about prompts and events.
settings.reminders.emailBody: We'll surface this once Resend is wired in.
settings.integrations.title: Integrations
settings.integrations.stravaBody: Strava OAuth/import is on the bonus track.
publicProfile.title: Public profile
publicProfile.privateBody: Only members of shared groups can see it.
publicProfile.notFoundBody: This username doesn't exist or has been removed.
